label: Harrison Rural Electrification Association (HREA)
notes: NISC SmartHub portal (harrisonrea.smarthub.coop confirmed Jun 2026) — extension scrapes billing + usage. Serves north-central WV (Harrison/Doddridge/Marion/Taylor/Barbour/Upshur/Lewis counties). kWh unverified on a real generation meter; verify before trusting reports.

label: Appalachian Power (AEP)
notes: Appalachian Power (AEP) — serves ~740k customers in southern/western WV and Northern Panhandle (includes Wheeling Power subsidiary). MyAccount portal at appalachianpower.com, bespoke adapter needs live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: Mon Power (FirstEnergy)
notes: Mon Power (FirstEnergy) — serves ~395k customers in 34 WV counties (northern half of state). FirstEnergy MyAccount portal, bespoke adapter needs live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: City of New Martinsville Electric Department
notes: New Martinsville municipal utility (~1,310 residential + 435 commercial customers, Wetzel County). Payment portal via PSN (Payment Service Network), not SmartHub. Manual PDF upload until adapter built.

label: City of Philippi Municipal Electric
notes: Philippi municipal utility. UBS Utilities Management portal (adg.philippi.org/ubs1), not SmartHub. Manual PDF upload until adapter built.
